goal: Extend verify-task-lock.cjs with an optional council_session_required preflight guard and tests, without changing default task behavior.
scope_out: No default mandatory council check for old contracts
No auth, secrets, DB, deploy, live Builder, AICOS write, or Soulmatch copy
claims: Contracts may set council_session_required=true to require an active session before preflight.
The guard checks session.json under BLUEPILOT_COUNCIL_ROOT or repo root.
Default contracts without council_session_required remain backward compatible.
Tests cover missing session, paused session, active session, and default compatibility.
assumptions: Council-session enforcement should be opt-in per contract first to avoid breaking legacy tasks.
Future BP-C2/BP-C3 contracts can set council_session_required=true.
Temp roots are sufficient to test guard behavior.
stop_conditions: Legacy preflight behavior breaks for contracts without council_session_required
prior_task_findings: BP-091 and BP-092 added BP-C2 route-only model pool and read-only context broker. WLP guard should now make active Council Session enforceable for future contracts.
